summary: Accepted SIM-006. The content compiler v0, synthetic 30-node/60-edge fixture, runtime content pack parser/index, CLI validator, and required tests satisfy the task acceptance criteria. Review found no blocking scope, determinism, runtime filesystem, dependency, or historical-content violations.

tests_run.result: PASS: m1.abstract-graph-30 compiled with nodes=30, edges=60, manifestHash=4a438525.
PASS: Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
PASS: recursive workspace typecheck completed, including content-schema, content-runtime, and content-tools.
PASS: ESLint completed with no reported violations.
PASS: all matched files use Prettier code style.
PASS: architecture check passed, sim determinism matched Node/worker hashes, root Vitest 11 files/45 tests passed, web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.

decisions: Verified the task implementation stays within SIM-006 implementation scope; project routing/status files are operational state, not content/compiler behavior.
Verified the fixture is synthetic kernel data only: node-### and edge-### IDs, abstract displayNameKey tokens, fixtureKind synthetic-kernel-graph, and syntheticScope deterministic-kernel-only.

Verified compiler behavior rejects schema errors, duplicate IDs, bad references, duplicate route semantics, unstable ordering, and unmarked isolated nodes, and produces deterministic runtime ordering and manifest hash 4a438525.
Verified runtime content parsing/indexing performs no filesystem access and exposes ID-based lookup, not display-name-based entity lookup.
Verified package dependencies are workspace-local only; no SQL/ORM, server, remote execution, runtime crypto, arbitrary code execution, or new external production dependency was introduced.
risks: Content-runtime is intentionally not wired into sim-core in SIM-006 because sim-core was outside the allowed paths; later integration should add contract tests at the sim-core boot boundary.
Compiler v0 is limited to the synthetic M1 abstract graph fixture and does not validate future M2 geometry or production historical content.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted SIM-006 review result and proceed with lead orchestration for final task state, commit, and next routing as appropriate.
